style.styleSentence: A hyper-energetic 136 BPM bashment riddim driven by massive sound-system bass, aggressive Caribbean drums, and overdriven 808s, featuring hypnotic female vocals that dominate a neon-soaked nightclub atmosphere with cinematic breakdowns and intense call-and-response toasting.
